projectDescription: Clustering and regression analysis on RIIID education logs to identify student difficulties and predict performance.
keyFeatures: K-Means clustering with 20 clusters for student performance segmentation
Regularized least squares model achieving ~80.7% accuracy
Advanced feature engineering including performance trends and explanation impact
Confusion matrix evaluation with precision and accuracy metrics
Julia-based implementation with DataFrames, Clustering, and PlotlyJS
publicApiSurface: prepare_features(df) - Engineer features from raw education logs
regularized_ls(X, y, λ) - Train regularized least squares model
predict(X, β) - Make predictions with trained model
split_data(X, y, train_ratio) - Split dataset into train/test sets
print_confusion_matrix_table(X, y, β) - Display confusion matrix and metrics
regularize_attempts(X, λ) - Apply regularization to attempt counts
